## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? Link any related issues. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New tool / prompt / resource
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / build / tooling
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] If a new tool: input schema documented, error codes listed, integration test added
- [ ] If user-visible: README / CHANGELOG updated
- [ ] No secrets committed; no `console.log` left in source

## Notes for reviewers
